_comment: Documented hero-image needs for blog posts shipped without generated heroes. Grok (Imagine/SuperGrok) or agy (Nano Banana Pro, Search-grounded) generates these later; Frank/Claude validates against brand (taste.md, noir-tech / editorial lane) before final. Until generated, posts either point at a dedicated path (404 hero, acceptable per Frank 2026-06-06) or a fallback image (noted). Render target 16:9, deep dark editorial tech aesthetic, NO text artifacts.
lane: noir-tech / editorial (deep navy/indigo, cyan + amber accents, premium, restrained)

needs.prompt: A sleek dark-mode flat-lay of a faceless YouTube production pipeline — glowing app icons for voice, avatar, script, and clip tools connected by neon circuit lines flowing into a single play button, premium editorial tech aesthetic, deep navy background with electric cyan and violet accents.

A clean editorial split-scene of three glowing developer workstations — a minimalist terminal, a code editor, and a multi-agent command center — connected by thin luminous data lines on a deep navy backdrop, premium tech-noir lighting, no text.

A clean editorial split-scene of four glowing terminal panels labeled Pro, Max 5x, Max 20x, and API, ascending like a staircase against deep noir-blue with warm amber accent light, premium financial-dashboard aesthetic, no text artifacts.

A sleek dark studio scene where a glowing audio waveform splits into many smaller colored waveforms of descending size, each tagged with a tiny price label, premium cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, editorial tech aesthetic.

A split-frame studio scene — one side an open glowing soundwave flowing freely out of a laptop toward distant streaming-platform icons, the other side the same waveform sealed behind a translucent glass garden dome, cinematic teal-and-amber lighting, premium editorial tech aesthetic.

A clean editorial flat-lay of six glowing node-graph control panels arranged on a dark slate desk, connected by luminous cyan data threads converging into a single central agent core, soft cinematic rim light, premium tech-noir aesthetic.

Three glowing holographic talking-head avatars side by side on a dark editorial studio backdrop, each lit in a distinct accent color — confident realism, corporate polish, kinetic creator energy — rim-lit, cinematic, premium tech aesthetic.

A sleek open laptop on a dark desk glowing with soft cyan light, three translucent memory chips labeled 8 / 16 / 32 floating above the keyboard like holograms, neural-network filaments threading between them, cinematic editorial product photography, shallow depth of field.

A clean editorial flat-lay of three glowing price tags labeled GPT-5.5, Claude Opus 4.8, and Gemini 3.1 connected by routing lines to a single central gateway node, deep indigo-to-black gradient background with crisp neon-teal accents, premium fintech-dashboard aesthetic, no text clutter.

A sleek dark editorial flat-lay of six glowing presentation-app tiles arranged on a deep slate surface, one tile cracked and faded gray to signify a discontinued tool, cinematic rim lighting, electric-blue and warm-amber accents, ultra-clean premium tech aesthetic, 16:9.

A premium editorial arrangement of glowing image-generation model tiles (GPT Image, Nano Banana, FLUX, Midjourney) emanating a single luminous generated portrait, deep dark backdrop, cyan-and-amber rim light, ultra-clean tech aesthetic, no text.

A cinematic constellation of glowing AI-tool and MCP-server nodes organized into labeled clusters (content, video, code, voice, automation) connected to a central agent core, deep navy editorial backdrop, cyan + violet accents, premium tech aesthetic, no text.

A precise editorial still of a glass research console glowing with branching citation threads and a single comet streaking across a dark midnight-blue field, soft cyan light, minimal and confident, no text.

A sleek studio microphone dissolving into flowing ribbons of luminous teal soundwaves that branch into multiple language glyphs and a glowing API node graph, dark cinematic background, premium editorial lighting, shallow depth of field.

A cinematic control-room dashboard glowing in liquid-glass blue and amber, a single creator's silhouette directing a constellation of floating video model panels that all render the same consistent character face, anamorphic lens, volumetric light.

A sleek dark-mode video editing timeline glowing on a desktop screen, animated word-by-word captions and a vertical 9:16 short-form clip floating above it, cinematic teal-and-violet rim light, premium editorial tech aesthetic, no text artifacts.

A sleek dark-mode laptop on a minimalist desk showing a glowing, perfectly-designed pitch deck mid-generation, a single line of prompt text dissolving into ordered glass slides, cinematic editorial lighting, deep navy and warm amber accents.

A sleek glassmorphic creator workspace at dusk, a single brand-colored design asset fanning out into ten platform formats along glowing light-trails, deep indigo and warm amber palette, cinematic depth, premium and uncluttered.

A clean editorial flat-lay of glowing interlinked nodes forming three central network hubs with recurring-revenue streams flowing outward to AI-tool icons, deep navy background, gold and electric-teal accents, premium fintech aesthetic, no text, cinematic soft lighting.

A single glowing search-result card floating in dark space, dissolving into clean ribbons of light that flow into the citation footnotes of an AI chat answer, deep indigo-to-cyan gradient, minimal luxury editorial style, cinematic depth, no text artifacts.

A single architect's desk at dawn, six softly glowing glass pillars rising from an open laptop like a miniature cathedral of light, each pillar labeled with a faint icon, deep editorial blues and warm amber, cinematic depth of field, premium and understated.

A photoreal digital twin of a creator emerging from a single glowing 15-second phone clip, the same face fanning out into a grid of identical avatars each captioned in a different language, cinematic studio teal-and-amber with subtle holographic depth.

A single long cinematic film strip flowing left into a glowing AI prism that fans out into ten vertical phone-shaped shorts, each tagged with a small score badge, deep indigo-to-violet gradient, soft volumetric light, premium editorial tech aesthetic, no text.

A dark cinematic control-room scene where a glowing workflow canvas of interconnected nodes flows into a luminous agent core, electric-blue data threads bridging reasoning and action, premium editorial tech aesthetic, soft volumetric light, ultra-sharp detail.

Three sleek glass browser windows floating in dark editorial space — one glowing teal, one cyan, one minimal white — each casting a thin agentic light-trail toward a shared cursor, liquid-glass reflections, premium cinematic lighting, no text.

A confident professional in soft studio light fractures into a grid of subtly varied AI-generated headshot frames, one frame glowing sharper than the rest, editorial and clean against a deep neutral backdrop.

A clean split-screen tech still life on a dark editorial backdrop — left a long horizontal video timeline sliced into glowing vertical 9:16 clip cards, right an autonomous render queue assembling a faceless short, cyan and warm amber accents, premium product-shot lighting, no text.

A pristine matte-white ecommerce product on a softly lit seamless studio backdrop, mid-transformation as a translucent grid of AI-generated lifestyle scenes materializes around it, hyperreal product lighting, shallow depth of field, premium editorial cinematic look.

A clean split-frame editorial still — left a single glowing chat conversation window in calm dark-blue space, right a cluttered control panel of dashboard widgets and template cards — a thin bright seam dividing them, premium minimalist tech aesthetic, soft cinematic rim lighting.

Three sleek terminal-and-window panels glowing on a dark desk beside a real mini-PC, each running a different local AI model, cool blue and amber light, cinematic editorial product photography, shallow depth of field.

A minimalist editorial flat-lay of six glowing audio-waveform cards fanned across a dark slate surface, each tagged with a small price label and a green or red license checkmark, a single golden coin resting on the cheapest card, cinematic soft side-light, premium tech-magazine aesthetic.

A warm inviting overhead desk scene of a beginner's first coding project glowing on a laptop screen, three softly-lit app-builder interfaces floating as translucent glass panels above the keyboard, deep indigo and amber palette, cinematic editorial lighting, approachable.

A sleek dark editing interface where a glowing block of transcript text dissolves into a video timeline, words turning into film frames mid-air, soft cyan and violet light, premium editorial product shot, clean negative space.

A minimalist glass-and-steel desk at blue hour, a single glowing neural-network constellation rising out of an open notebook like a luminous second brain, soft cyan and warm amber rim light, shallow depth of field, premium editorial product photography.

Three luminous glass orbs (green, blue, violet) floating in dark studio space, each refracting a different stream of light, premium liquid-glass aesthetic, cinematic depth, editorial product-photography lighting, no text.

A split video-editing timeline glowing on a dark editorial desk, four app panels fanning out for short-form, text-based, pro and AI-native editing, cyan and amber rim light, premium tech aesthetic, no text.

Four glowing translucent meeting-assistant app cards floating above a minimalist desk, one recording silently with no bot icon and three with small participant-bot badges, cool blue and amber accent light, premium liquid-glass aesthetic, no text.

Four glowing logo marks emerging from a single prompt of light, three crystallizing into sharp vector wireframe paths and one dissolving into raster pixels, editorial minimalism, deep teal and amber accents, no text.

A pristine minimalist desk shot from above, a single resume sheet glowing softly beside a laptop showing a clean AI chat interface, cool editorial light, shallow depth of field, restrained liquid-glass accents in deep blue and white.
